item.title: 内存作为受控过程：LLM 代理的学习自适应内存管理
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13591v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on external memory systems to accumulate experience across tasks. Yet nearly all existing approaches, from graph-structured memories to reflective insight stores, access memory through fixed, hand-designed heuristics.
